titleStmt.title: SII 5.408: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 408. (A.R. No. 119 of 1894). ON THE OUTSIDE OF THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrī . śrīkomāṟavaṉmarāṉa śrītribhu vaṉacakra vattikaḷ koṉerimaiko
ṇṭāṉ perumāḷ cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvati ṉetir [7 ḷ 2 10 1 kku]
Aparapakṣa ttu saptami yum somavāra śubhayoga mum peṟṟa pūcattiṉāḷ pūcam piṟanta tiru
nelvelipperumāḷ peruṭaiya nāmum Attattiṉāḷ piṟanta pāṇṭiyapperumāḷ peru
ṭaiya nāmum Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiya tampirāṉāṟkum nācciyār tirukkāmakko
ṭṭattu Āḷuṭaiyanācciyāṟkum Ucciccanti Avatāṉattil virapāṇṭiyaṉcanti Uṭa
ṉkūṭi naṭantuvarumpaṭikkuk kaṟpitta vakai Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi tirumālai tiruvi
ḷakku Ilaiyamu taṭaikkāy Uḷpaṭa naṭakkum nittal niyamaṅkaḷukku Ivvāṇṭu pacāṉa
mutalukkut tevatāṉamākak koṭutta kuḷamāvatu Ācūrnāṭṭu nam kaṇṭuḻavu teṟku ku
ḻiyil Oṭaikkup perunāṉkellaiāvatu kiḻelkai koṟṟavaṉvāḷkoḷḷi Ū
ṟṟukkaraippaṟṟil Elkaikkum vaḷḷiōṭaikkum meṟku teṉelkai veppaṉku
cam parumpukkum vaṭakkum mel Elkai talaiyāṉnaṭantāṉ
Elkaikkum veṭṭaiveṉṟu kaikkoṇṭāṉ kuḷattil Elkaikkum kiḻakku vaThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 5.408 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
